questions.title: Clinical Assessment - Self-Harm
questions.question_text: What are the key observations you would monitor for a patient with self-harm?
expected_points: Assess self-harm using appropriate assessment tools
Monitor vital signs and observations specific to self-harm
Implement evidence-based interventions for self-harm
Document findings and care provided
Escalate concerns appropriately in mental_health setting
